title: Lithuania warns Russia could be planning ‘targeted’ attacks on critical infrastructure – Europe live
summary_full: Kremlin dismisses Lithuania’s warnings of potential strikes on critical infrastructure as ‘horror stories’Meanwhile, the Kremlin has rejected Lithuanian president’s warnings about a potential Russian attack on critical infrastructure (10:06), dismissing them as “horror stories” intended to “prepare public for further militarisation.”Reuters reported that the Kremlin said these comments were merely a “pretext for further deployment of Nato military infrastructure to Baltic states.” Continue reading...
